scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n be,fe -c blue,magenta "cd apps/backend && bun run dev" "cd apps/frontend && bun run dev"
scripts.build: cd packages/shared && bun run build && cd ../../apps/backend && bun run build && cd ../frontend && bun run build
scripts.test: cd apps/backend && bun test && cd ../frontend && bun run test
